title: E2E integration test: k8s backend against kind cluster
description:
What: Write an end-to-end integration test that exercises the full secretx-k8s round-trip against a real Kubernetes cluster (kind is the recommended CI option). Test is skipped unless SECRETX_K8S_KUBECONFIG is set.

Algorithm:
1. Guard at top of test: if std::env::var("SECRETX_K8S_KUBECONFIG").is_err() { return; }
2. Set KUBECONFIG to the value of SECRETX_K8S_KUBECONFIG for this test process.
3. Create a unique test namespace: secretx-test-<uuid> (use a simple timestamp or uuid crate).
4. Steps:
   a. round_trip_no_key: put b"hello-world" via from_uri_writable("secretx:k8s:<ns>/test-secret"); get via from_uri("secretx:k8s:<ns>/test-secret"); assert_eq!(value.as_bytes(), b"hello-world").
   b. round_trip_with_key: put b"pass123" via from_uri_writable("secretx:k8s:<ns>/multi?key=password"); put b"admin" via from_uri_writable("secretx:k8s:<ns>/multi?key=username"); get with ?key=password -> b"pass123"; get with ?key=username -> b"admin". Verify both keys coexist.
   c. update_existing: put b"v2" to same URI as step (a); get -> b"v2". Oracle: b"v2" is the known new value.
   d. key_not_found: get from "secretx:k8s:<ns>/test-secret?key=nonexistent" -> Err(NotFound).
   e. secret_not_found: get from "secretx:k8s:<ns>/does-not-exist" -> Err(NotFound).
5. Cleanup: delete the test namespace after all steps (best-effort, log warning on failure).
6. All assertions: assert_eq!(val.as_bytes(), b"expected") — the oracle is the known input bytes.

Defensive programming rules:
- Test must not log secret values; use assert_eq! only.
- Cleanup must run even if assertions fail (use defer or explicit finally block with catch_unwind).
- The test namespace must be unique per run to avoid interference with parallel CI runs.
- Never hardcode a kubeconfig path; always read from env var.

Subagent instructions: Spawn research subagent to look at secretx-aws-sm integration test for the skip-unless-env-var guard pattern. Spawn validation subagent to run cargo test -p secretx-k8s -- --ignored (if test is marked #[ignore]) against a kind cluster.

Tests: the test function is itself the E2E test; all assertions listed above.
